title: Latest iOS 27 Beta Offers More Hints About Apple's Foldable iPhone
summary: Earlier iOS 27 betas have hinted at a foldable iPhone , including support for widgets that expand into full-page view and code that mentions a "foldState." Apple hasn't confirmed anything, of course, but it's expected to unveil a foldable iPhone alongside the…
